ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review for which metrics are collected */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the review */,
  "awesome_count" INTEGER /* Count of 'awesome' mentions in the review */,
  "great_count" INTEGER /* Count of 'great' mentions in the review */,
  "fantastic_count" INTEGER /* Count of 'fantastic' mentions in the review */,
  "negative_sentiment_count" INTEGER /* Count of negative sentiment mentions in the review */,
  "neutral_sentiment_count" INTEGER /* Count of neutral sentiment mentions in the review */,
  "positive_sentiment_count" INTEGER /* Count of positive sentiment mentions in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_metrics_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for admin authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the admin user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the admin user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the admin user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the admin's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., feature, benefit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_tags" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being responded to */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin responding */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the admin's response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the wishlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., review response, product update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product to which the image is associated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., main, detail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount on the product */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Expiration date of the discount */,
  "minimum_purchase" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount for the discount to apply */,
  "maximum_discount" REAL /* Maximum discount amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
